soft_skills: Ability to work independently and collaboratively

job_responsibilities: Design and develop the user interface of web applications using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Collaborate with the development team to ensure that the user interface meets the specified requirements and quality standards
Debug and resolve issues in the front-end code, including performance and usability issues
Participate in code reviews and contribute to the development of new features and functionality
Develop and maintain reusable UI components and libraries
Participate in the development and maintenance of the application documentation
Stay current with industry trends and developments in front-end development

questions.question: What is the primary function of the Jest testing framework in front-end development?

options.text: To bundle JavaScript code for production
To test and validate React components
To manage dependencies in a project
To optimize images for web applications

questions.question: Which of the following front-end frameworks is known for its use of templates and two-way data binding?
What is the purpose of using a task runner like gulp or grunt in front-end development?

options.text: To write more efficient JavaScript code
To automate repetitive tasks and workflows

questions.question: What is the primary role of the Cypress testing framework in front-end development?

options.text: To test and validate front-end user interface functionality
To manage state in React applications
To optimize front-end code for production

questions.question: Which of the following is a benefit of using reusable UI components in front-end development?
What is the primary function of the webpack module bundler in front-end development?

options.text: To write more efficient CSS code
To bundle and optimize JavaScript code for production

questions.question: Which front-end framework is known for its virtual DOM and one-way data binding?
What is the purpose of participating in code reviews in front-end development?

options.text: To debug and resolve issues in the front-end code
To improve code quality and maintainability

questions.question: Which of the following skills is required to design and develop the user interface of web applications?
What is the benefit of staying current with industry trends and developments in front-end development?

options.text: Reduced need for continuous learning and professional development
Improved ability to adapt to new technologies and frameworks
Decreased job prospects and career advancement opportunities
Increased difficulty in collaborating with other developers
